subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out. I’d be glad to explore a collaboration. I’m available for a call on 2026-04-21, 2026-04-22, or 2026-04-23, any time between 14:00 and 16:00 UTC. Please let me know which slot works best for you.

For any additional company information, please refer to our public website. I’m not able to share internal contact details.

Best,
Agent
